summary: Frontend-only E2E test of the dual demo template app (AURUM & CO. e-commerce + PATITAS & CO. services). All 13 features from the review request work correctly. Initial test run reported 8/13 due to test-script timing/selector issues; after re-verification with corrected selectors, ALL critical flows pass (root selector, ecommerce home, catalog filter/sort/search, product detail + add to cart + buy now, cart, checkout (form -> processing -> Pago aprobado in ~2.8s) with cart clearing, admin login (wrong + correct), products CRUD with localStorage persistence into store catalog, categories CRUD with delete-blocked-when-products toast, reset demo, logout, services landing, 3-step booking wizard ending with booking-confirmed code).

issues: React hydration warnings: <span data-ve-dynamic="true"> wrappers (auto-injected by the Emergent visual editor on x-source array-mapped elements) end up as direct children of <tbody>, with <tr> nested inside <span>. This is platform tooling, not user code, but it pollutes the console with hydration errors. Same pattern affects <select><option> inside Product dialog. Consider asking platform to suppress ve-dynamic wrappers on table/select children, or render rows without array-mapping macro.
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to product-dialog and category-dialog for a11y compliance.

action_items: (Low) Add <DialogDescription> to ProductsAdmin and CategoriesAdmin Dialogs to silence Radix a11y warnings.

(Low/Platform) Hydration warnings caused by ve-dynamic <span style=display:contents> wrappers around <tr> and <option> elements. Either suppress via the visual-editor instrumentation or restructure the table/select to avoid array-map macro on direct children of <tbody>/<select>.
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext correctly persists products/categories/cart/auth/bookings to localStorage via useEffect; new admin-created products immediately appear in the storefront catalog (verified live).
Checkout uses a 2.8s setTimeout for the fake Mercado Pago flow and clears cart on success - verified end-to-end.
Booking date input correctly enforces min=tomorrow via minDate() helper.
Admin login uses mock credentials hard-coded in context (admin@demo.com / admin123). Acceptable for a demo template but obviously not for production.
Most interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes. Good test coverage hooks throughout the app.
Minor: cart count badge in header has no dedicated data-testid (uses cart-link only with inline span). Optional improvement.
Minor: Hydration warnings are environmental (visual editor), not from the developer's code.
seed_data_creation: None required - app self-seeds via /src/data/seedData on first localStorage read.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is 100% frontend mocked via localStorage at https://patitas-services.preview.emergentagent.com. Booking confirmation code is shown as 'BK-<timestamp>' (uppercased on screen). When testing localStorage persistence end-to-end, remember the AppProvider hydrates once at mount, but all subscribers share the same React state so changes from admin are immediately visible in storefront without reload. Hydration console errors about <tr>/<span>/<option> are from platform visual-editor (data-ve-dynamic) wrappers and not user-fixable in app code.
rca of the issue: No real bugs found. Initial 5 'failures' in the first Playwright run were all test-script issues: (a) waiting for /ecommerce URL too strictly while React Router was still mounting Page wrapper, (b) using first_card.query_selector('a') when the ProductCard root itself is the Link (re-test clicked the data-testid root directly and it worked), (c) cascaded failures from (b) (empty cart -> checkout couldn't find form). Re-test with corrected selectors confirmed all features work.
